judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a newspaper clipping with multiple columns and annotations at the bottom, but Description B adds specific headline text, sub-headlines, and stamp details not mentioned in A, without contradiction.

gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned newspaper clipping collage mounted on a beige document page, headed “Planes Chasing Disks Find Only Empty Sky,” with multiple text columns about flying saucer reports and several stamped/handwritten archive markings at the bottom.*
